subcodes.first_line: O thou who beholdest the Abha Kingdom! I have taken up pen and ink that I might, enraptured by the divine fragrances, engage in His mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی خامه و مداد حاضر نموده که بذکر آن منجذب نفحات الله مشغول
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat], @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @love as fire, @the power of words; of speech
